origin.angelcube.slime-origin.slime-orig: Part Human, part Slime. Very unpleasant to touch.
You bounce on any block as if it were a Slime block.
power.angelcube.slime-origin.better_jump: Your slime heritage gives you an improved leap at the cost of a reduced movement speed.
power.angelcube.slime-origin.fragmentati: When others would die, twice per life, you will shrink to half your size.
power.angelcube.slime-origin.melting.des: Slime doesn't last very long in hot weather; you will burn when exposed to the sun in hot biomes.
You have the green, translucent skin of a Slime.
